ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Name of the body part being measured (e.g., bust, waist, hip) */,
  "size_inches" REAL /* Measurement value in inches */,
  "size_centimeters" REAL /* Measurement value in centimeters */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor used for converting between units */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "default_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Default measurement unit used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the size belongs to */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Size value (e.g., 30, 32, 34) */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the size is based on */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the size */,
  "conversion_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a conversion chart for size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., top, bottom, dress, outerwear) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Specific style of the product (e.g., A-line, Slim-fit) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., Cotton, Silk) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "available_stock" INTEGER /* Available stock for this size */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product for this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_system" TEXT /* Customer's preferred sizing system (e.g., US, UK) */,
  "measurement_profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's measurement profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_measurement_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_profile_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
column_names: Name of the body part being measured (e.g., bust, waist, hip)
Factor used for converting between units
Region the country belongs to (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia)
Default measurement unit used in the country
ID of the country the size belongs to
